title: Inorder Successor in BST
input_format: The root of a BST and a node `p` in the BST.
output_format: The in-order successor of node `p`, or `null` if no successor exists.
constraints:
- The number of nodes in the tree is in the range `[1, 10^4]`.
- `-10^5 <= Node.val <= 10^5`
- All values in the BST are unique.
function_signature: function inorderSuccessor(root: TreeNode | null, p: TreeNode): TreeNode | null {}
